args_template.sql: ALTER TABLE sales.MCP_TMP_TABLE ADD CreatedAt DATETIME2 NULL
CREATE TABLE sales.MCP_TMP_TABLE (Id INT PRIMARY KEY, Name NVARCHAR(50) NULL)
SELECT TOP 5 CustomerID, FirstName, LastName FROM sales.Customers ORDER BY CustomerID

args_template.arg2: SELECT TOP 5 ProductID, ProductName FROM sales.Products ORDER BY ProductID
